ops.text: Phase 2 of the comment cleanup (task 9ea75d3): the ~57-file disjoint set is being applied and shipped path-scoped; the ~30 files overlapping the concurrent wire-v2/supervise-Pool/daemon-Runtime refactor are HELD (user decision 2026-07-18). Held targets: daemon/{ensure,errors,peer,takeover}.go+tests, drain/liveness*.go, proc/reaper*.go, service/* (L7), supervise/* (roster obsolete — package replaced), wire/{client,envelope,server}.go, wire/lifeproto/gen/{main,spec}.go, plus test files the refactor deletes. Redo after the refactor lands: re-run those lane subsets against new HEAD (keep-list entries still apply where symbols survive), and sweep the refactor's NEW files (daemon/runtime.go, supervise/pool.go, wire/frame.go, wire/session.go, wire/lifecycle.go, service/restart.go). Attached: the 9 lane patches (diffs vs 756e04b8), keep-list, coverage matrix, lane rosters, record-id map, and the commentdiff comment-only gate tool.
